title: Azure Key Vault Secret Bundle
description: A secret consisting of a value, id and its attributes as returned by the Azure Key Vault data plane API. Based on the SecretBundle definition from the Azure Key Vault REST API reference at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/keyvault/secrets.

id.description: The secret id. The format is https://{vault-name}.vault.azure.net/secrets/{secret-name}/{secret-version}.

contentType.description: The content type of the secret (e.g., 'application/x-pkcs12', 'text/plain', 'application/json').

tags.description: Application specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

kid.description: If this is a secret backing a KV certificate, then this field specifies the corresponding key backing the KV certificate.

managed.description: True if the secret's lifetime is managed by key vault. If this is a secret backing a certificate, then managed will be true.

enabled.description: Determines whether the object is enabled.

nbf.description: Not before date in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp (seconds since 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z). The secret is not usable before this time.

exp.description: Expiry date in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp (seconds since 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z). The secret is not usable after this time.

created.description: Creation time in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp.

updated.description: Last updated time in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp.

recoverableDays.description: softDelete data retention days. Value should be >=7 and <=90 when softDelete enabled, otherwise 0.

DeletionRecoveryLevel.title: Deletion Recovery Level
DeletionRecoveryLevel.description: Reflects the deletion recovery level currently in effect for secrets in the current vault. If it contains 'Purgeable', the secret can be permanently deleted by a privileged user; otherwise, only the system can purge the secret at the end of the retention interval.

SecretSetParameters.title: Secret Set Parameters
SecretSetParameters.description: The request body for creating or updating a secret via PUT /secrets/{secret-name}.

tags.description: Application specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

contentType.description: Type of the secret value such as a password.

SecretUpdateParameters.title: Secret Update Parameters
SecretUpdateParameters.description: The request body for updating secret attributes via PATCH /secrets/{secret-name}/{secret-version}.

contentType.description: Type of the secret value such as a password.

tags.description: Application specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

SecretItem.title: Secret Item
SecretItem.description: The secret item containing secret metadata, as returned in list operations.

tags.description: Application specific metadata in the form of key-value pairs.

contentType.description: Type of the secret value such as a password.

managed.description: True if the secret's lifetime is managed by key vault.

SecretListResult.title: Secret List Result
SecretListResult.description: The secret list result returned by GET /secrets.

nextLink.description: The URL to get the next set of secrets.

DeletedSecretBundle.title: Deleted Secret Bundle
DeletedSecretBundle.description: A deleted secret consisting of its previous id, attributes, tags, and deletion information.

recoveryId.description: The url of the recovery object, used to identify and recover the deleted secret.

scheduledPurgeDate.description: The time when the secret is scheduled to be purged, in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp.

deletedDate.description: The time when the secret was deleted, in UTC, encoded as a Unix timestamp.

innererror.description: The key vault server inner error (recursive).
